ruleset.name: DCC crypto Rules
ruleset.description:
Custom PMD ruleset for io.decentralchain:crypto. Pure Java cryptographic primitives: - Hash.java — Blake2b256 / Keccak256 / SHA256 via BouncyCastle - Crypto.java — Curve25519 key generation / signing - BlsUtils.java — BLS12-381 operations via blst-java - MerkleTree.java — Merkle root construction - Bytes.java — byte array utilities - base/Base16/58/64.java — encoding / decoding - rsa/RsaKeyPair/PublicKey.java — RSA sign / verify - internal/Dictionary.java — BIP-39 word list
Patterns intentionally excluded: - Crypto methods take byte[] with fixed sizes (crypto wire format). UseVarargs would be semantically incorrect. - Abstract utility classes are not designed for serialization.
